briefdescription.para: No play range override.
Range set via SetMinMaxFrame.
Range set via SetMinMaxFrameByMarker.
Internal enum for how the play range was set.
The registered Lottie visual; null when no URL is set.
True when a property changed and the visual needs rebuilding on the next measure pass.
LottieAnimationViewImpl constructor.
A reference counted object may only be deleted by calling Unreference().
Creates a new LottieAnimationViewImpl.

simplesect.para: An intrusive pointer to the newly allocated LottieAnimationViewImpl

briefdescription.para: Sets the resource URL of the Lottie animation file.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the Lottie JSON file

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current resource URL.

simplesect.para: The URL of the Lottie JSON file currently set on this view

briefdescription.para: Starts or resumes playback of the animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Pauses playback of the animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Stops playback of the animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the number of times the animation should loop.

detaileddescription.para: A value of -1 means infinite looping. A value of 0 means the animation will not play. A positive value specifies an exact loop count.

parameterdescription.para: The loop count (-1 for infinite)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current loop count.

simplesect.para: The loop count, or -1 for infinite looping

briefdescription.para: Jumps to the specified frame number.

parameterdescription.para: The frame index to jump to

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the playback range by frame numbers.

detaileddescription.para: The animation will play between minFrame and maxFrame.

parameterdescription.para: The start frame index
The end frame index

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the playback range using marker names embedded in the Lottie file.

detaileddescription.para: If only minMarker is given, the animation plays the range of that marker. If both are given, the animation plays from the start of minMarker to the end of maxMarker.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the start marker
Name of the end marker (optional)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the behavior of the animation when it is stopped.

parameterdescription.para: The stop behavior

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current stop behavior.

simplesect.para: The current stop behavior

briefdescription.para: Sets the looping mode.

parameterdescription.para: RESTART or AUTO_REVERSE

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current looping mode.

simplesect.para: The current looping mode

briefdescription.para: Sets the speed factor for animation playback.

detaileddescription.para: Values between [0, 1] slow down the animation; values above 1 speed it up. The actual clamping to [0.01, 100.0] is handled by the underlying animation renderer.

parameterdescription.para: The speed multiplier (default: 1.0)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current frame speed factor.

simplesect.para: The frame speed factor

briefdescription.para: Gets the current playback state of the animation.

simplesect.para: The current PlayState

briefdescription.para: Gets the current frame number being displayed.

simplesect.para: The current frame index

briefdescription.para: Gets the total number of frames in the animation.

simplesect.para: The total frame count

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to redraw when the visual is scaled down.

parameterdescription.para: True to redraw on scale-down (default: true)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Returns whether redraw on scale-down is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if redraw on scale-down is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to redraw when the visual is scaled up.

parameterdescription.para: True to redraw on scale-up (default: true)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Returns whether redraw on scale-up is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if redraw on scale-up is enabled

briefdescription.para: Enables or disables frame caching.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, all decoded frames are cached in memory to reduce CPU cost during looping, at the expense of higher memory usage.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable frame caching (default: false)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Returns whether frame caching is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if frame caching is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to notify the render thread after each rasterization.

detaileddescription.para: Useful for low-fps Lottie files to avoid unnecessary render thread wakeups.

parameterdescription.para: True to notify after rasterization (default: false)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Returns whether notify-after-rasterization is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if notify-after-rasterization is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets the scale factor applied to the rasterization size.

detaileddescription.para: A value of 2.0 rasterizes at twice the visual dimensions, producing sharper output on high-density displays at the cost of higher memory usage. Negative values flip the image. The actual clamping is handled by the underlying animation renderer.

parameterdescription.para: The render scale multiplier (default: 1.0)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current render scale factor.

simplesect.para: The render scale (default: 1.0)

briefdescription.para: Gets layer information embedded in the Lottie file.

detaileddescription.para: The returned map contains layer names as keys and a two-element integer array [startFrame, endFrame] as values.

simplesect.para: A Property::Map of layer info

briefdescription.para: Gets marker information embedded in the Lottie file.

detaileddescription.para: The returned map contains marker names as keys and a two-element integer array [startFrame, endFrame] as values.

simplesect.para: A Property::Map of marker info

briefdescription.para: Sets a per-frame dynamic property callback on a specific layer/element.

detaileddescription.para: Ownership of DynamicPropertyInfo::callback is transferred to the visual.

parameterdescription.para: The dynamic property info

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired rasterization width as a hint for the renderer.

parameterdescription.para: The desired width in pixels (0 to use natural size)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired rasterization width hint.

simplesect.para: The desired width in pixels, or 0 if not set

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired rasterization height as a hint for the renderer.

parameterdescription.para: The desired height in pixels (0 to use natural size)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired rasterization height hint.

simplesect.para: The desired height in pixels, or 0 if not set

briefdescription.para: Sets the release policy for the animation resource.

parameterdescription.para: The release policy to use

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the release policy.

simplesect.para: The current release policy

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the animation JSON is loaded synchronously.

parameterdescription.para: True to load synchronously on the main thread

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether synchronous loading is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if synchronous loading is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the rendered frames use pre-multiplied alpha.

parameterdescription.para: True if pre-multiplied alpha is used

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether pre-multiplied alpha is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if pre-multiplied alpha is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets the color multiplier applied to the entire animation.

detaileddescription.para: For per-layer color control, use SetDynamicProperty() instead.

parameterdescription.para: The RGBA color to multiply with the animation

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the color multiplier applied to the animation.

simplesect.para: The current image color

briefdescription.para: Sets the depth index for the animation.

parameterdescription.para: The depth index to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets the URL of a placeholder image shown while loading.

parameterdescription.para: The URL of the placeholder image

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the placeholder image URL.

simplesect.para: The URL of the placeholder image, or empty string if not set

briefdescription.para: Returns the signal emitted when the animation finishes all loops.

simplesect.para: A reference to the AnimationFinished signal

briefdescription.para: Gets the current loading status of the animation.

simplesect.para: The current ResourceStatus of the animation visual

briefdescription.para: Called after the actor has been initialized.
Called during measure pass. Override to implement custom measurement.
Called during arrange pass. Override to implement custom arrangement.
Rebuilds and re-registers the Lottie visual from current property values.
Applies padding-aware transform to the visual for the given size.

detaileddescription.para: When padding is set, the visual is confined to the inner content area. This is the Lottie equivalent of ImageViewImpl::ApplyFittingMode, but without FittingMode support (always FILL within the padded area).

parameterdescription.para: The allocated size of the view

briefdescription.para: Called when a visual event signal is emitted.
Rebuilds and re-registers the placeholder visual.
Called when the view's ResourceReady signal is emitted.
This is the internal implementation class for LottieAnimationView.
